ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city is in */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the city is in */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the city was founded */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  "historical_population" TEXT /* JSON object storing historical population data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county is in */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the county was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZIP code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the ZIP code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ZIP code region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the ZIP code region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ZIP code data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the demographics belong to */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution data for the city */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution data for the city */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution data for the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing gender distribution data */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing education level distribution data */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
